profiles.name: Professional
profiles.description: I am trying to garner interest in my talents and experience so that I stand out and make easy for the recruiter to hire me. Be very professional.

profiles.name: Professional Concise
profiles.description: Be highly professional and direct. Focus on measurable impact, outcomes, and role alignment with minimal fluff. Use bullet points and concise language.

profiles.name: Professional Warm
profiles.description: Be professional and polished with a friendly tone. Emphasize collaboration, communication, and business value.

profiles.name: Professional Creative & Colorful
profiles.description: Be professional and polished with a friendly tone. Emphasize collaboration, communication, and business value. Allow the letter to be visually colorful and engaging. Utilize bold colors and fonts (and sizes) to make the letter more engaging.
